features.name: escaped_identifier_in_submodule
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier (backslash-prefixed) declared inside a submodule that is instantiated beneath the top level
features.snippet:
module bottom(); reg \escaped[2]; endmodule
module top(); bottom UUT(); endmodule

features.name: escaped_identifier_hierarchical_reference
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical reference to an escaped identifier through a submodule instance, where the escaped identifier is part of a dotted path
features.snippet: bottom UUT(); // escaped identifier is \escaped[2] in bottom module
